synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-2780 Oracle Linux 9 redis:7 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2780
description:
[7.2.11-2.0.1]
- Build with 64k pages to support redis on UEK on aarch64

[7.2.11-2]
- add sysusers.d file for user management
- add tmpfiles.d file for temporary dir management

[7.2.11-1]
- rebase to 7.2.11 for CVE-2025-49844 CVE-2025-46817 CVE-2025-46818 CVE-2025-46819

[7.2.10-1]
- rebase to 7.2.10 for CVE-2025-27151 CVE-2025-32023 and CVE-2025-48367

[7.2.8-1]
- rebase to 7.2.8 for CVE-2025-21605

[7.2.7-1]
- rebase to 7.2.7 for CVE-2024-46981 and CVE-2024-51741

[7.2.6-1]
- rebase to 7.2.6  RHEL-26628
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2780

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-2780.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
redis-7.2.11-2.0.1.module+el9.7.0+90806+2f80a718.x86_64.rpm
redis-devel-7.2.11-2.0.1.module+el9.7.0+90806+2f80a718.x86_64.rpm
redis-doc-7.2.11-2.0.1.module+el9.7.0+90806+2f80a718.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
redis-7.2.11-2.0.1.module+el9.7.0+90806+2f80a718.aarch64.rpm
redis-doc-7.2.11-2.0.1.module+el9.7.0+90806+2f80a718.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/redis-7.2.11-2.0.1.module+el9.7.0+90806+2f80a718.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[7.2.11-2.0.1]
- Build with 64k pages to support redis on UEK on aarch64

[7.2.11-2]
- add sysusers.d file for user management
- add tmpfiles.d file for temporary dir management

[7.2.11-1]
- rebase to 7.2.11 for CVE-2025-49844 CVE-2025-46817 CVE-2025-46818 CVE-2025-46819

[7.2.10-1]
- rebase to 7.2.10 for CVE-2025-27151 CVE-2025-32023 and CVE-2025-48367

[7.2.8-1]
- rebase to 7.2.8 for CVE-2025-21605

[7.2.7-1]
- rebase to 7.2.7 for CVE-2024-46981 and CVE-2024-51741

[7.2.6-1]
- rebase to 7.2.6  RHEL-26628
